---
title: "Projects"
---

The NYC Open Data Lab produces a range of public-facing projects that connect teaching, research, and civic data analysis.

These projects are designed to be reproducible, accessible, and meaningful beyond the classroom—transforming individual work into part of a broader, growing ecosystem.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## NYC Open Data Student Gallery

The NYC Open Data Student Gallery is a collection of graduate student research projects developed using NYC Open Data. Each project explores a unique question about New York City through data analysis, visualization, and reproducible workflows.

All projects are published as part of a cohesive, public-facing body of work.

👉 [View the Student Gallery](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-student-gallery.share.connect.posit.cloud/)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Student Portfolio Books

As part of the Lab’s reproducible workflow model, students develop personal portfolio books using Quarto. These books compile their work into a single, polished, and shareable artifact—designed to showcase their skills in data analysis, storytelling, and reproducible research.

Each portfolio represents not just completed assignments, but a cohesive narrative of the student’s work.

## Featured Portfolios

- [**Crystal Adote**](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-lab.share.connect.posit.cloud/contributors/crystal-adote.html) — [View Portfolio](https://019c7e87-9883-6209-abee-7d4f43167df7.share.connect.posit.cloud/)
- [**Jonah Dratfield**](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-lab.share.connect.posit.cloud/contributors/jonah-dratfield) — [View Portfolio](https://019c6c0a-422b-4619-247b-d5dc28e84b0a.share.connect.posit.cloud/)
- [**Joyce Escatel-Flores**](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-lab.share.connect.posit.cloud/contributors/joyce-escatel-flores.html) — [View Portfolio](https://019c7e86-1345-35d0-799d-de52723a9aa3.share.connect.posit.cloud/)
- [**Robert Hutto**](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-lab.share.connect.posit.cloud/contributors/robert-hutto.html) — [View Portfolio](https://posit.cloud/content/11909755)
- [**Isley Jean-Pierre**](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-lab.share.connect.posit.cloud/contributors/isley-jean-pierre.html) — [View Portfolio](https://bookdown.org/content/44ef55ba-9048-4d19-a9b2-78c7ff7c557a/)
- [**Shannon Joyce**](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-lab.share.connect.posit.cloud/contributors/shannon-joyce.html) — [View Portfolio](https://019c7f53-4be2-1e5f-eb67-bc25d711ee72.share.connect.posit.cloud/)
- [**Emma Tupone**](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-lab.share.connect.posit.cloud/contributors/emma-tupone.html) — [View Portfolio](https://019b2f1f-f2b9-d61a-d328-03690c0bd6da.share.connect.posit.cloud/index.html)
- [**Xinru Wang**](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-lab.share.connect.posit.cloud/contributors/xinru-wang.html) — [View Portfolio](https://019c7c8e-197b-0c55-fbf6-d685497e25bb.share.connect.posit.cloud/)
- [**Laura Rose Werner**](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-lab.share.connect.posit.cloud/contributors/laura-rose-werner.html) — [View Portfolio](https://019c7ca5-9872-3f70-0ff8-780f5f216b2e.share.connect.posit.cloud/)
